title: cosmos sessilis var. sessilis
intro: Cosmos sessilis var. sessilis, also known as swamp cosmos or water cosmos, is a variety of the cosmos flower that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of cosmos sessilis var. sessilis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and menstrual cramps.
